features: REFRESHING FORMULA – This NIVEA Men's shower gel and face wash features energising mint extract to help recharge and cleanse skin after a long day
ENERGISING FRAGRANCE – The cleansing wash contains a blend of citrus and aromatic spice notes, crafted to bring an exhilarating boost to your shower routine
MINT EXTRACT – The mint extract inside our men's shower gel delivers a 24h fresh effect while recharging your skin and senses for a revitalising shower experience
3-IN-1 FORMULA – This dermatologically approved and microplastic-free shower gel can be used on body, face and hair leaving your skin and hair feeling refreshed and cared for
HOW TO USE – Take a shower and wet your skin thoroughly. Apply the body wash to your whole body, face and hair. Rinse the residue off thoroughly before patting yourself dry
description: Product Description NIVEA MEN Energy Shower Gel 500 ml – Recharge daily with NIVEA MEN Energy Need to recharge? NIVEA MEN Energy Shower Gel is designed to refresh and recharge with every wash. Formulated with a burst of natural mint, it leaves skin feeling energised, moisturised, and healthy-looking. Suitable for body, face, and hair, this shower gel provides long-lasting freshness and a clean, cared-for skin feel. Ideal for starting the day strong or revitalising after a workout. The 99% biodegradable formula is free of microplastics and gentle on skin, making it the perfect choice for men who value both care and sustainability. Simply squeeze the desired amount onto your palm, lather it up and massage into wet hair/skin and then rinse. Formulated with a refreshing, masculine scent, the gel removes excess oils, grease and any residual styling product from your hair and skin. Product Benefits: Refreshing formula with mint extract Energising fragrance to boost the senses Deeply cleanses and effectively removes dirt 3-in-1 – ideal for body, face, and hair Microplastic-free formula 500 ml Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
